title: Effectively Monitoring Production Systems with Prometheus Metrics
excerpt: A practical playbook for instrumenting production services with Prometheus — the four golden signals, picking the right metric type, Spring Boot + Micrometer, PromQL queries that earn their keep, SLO-based alerting, and the cardinality trap.

title: Getting Started with Apache Kafka: A Practical Guide
excerpt: Apache Kafka is a distributed event streaming platform. In this post I walk through key concepts — producers, consumers, topics, and partitions — with hands-on Java examples.

title: Reactive Programming with Spring WebFlux
excerpt: How I leveraged Spring WebFlux and Project Reactor at OpenText to build a high-throughput document management API — and the lessons I learned along the way.
